sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁבּתון

Transliteration: shabbâthôn

Phonetic: shab-baw-thone'

BDB Definition:

  1. Sabbath observance, sabbatism
    1. of weekly sabbath
    2. day of atonement
    3. sabbatical year
    4. of Feast of Trumpets
    5. of the 1st and last days of the Feast of Tabernacles

Origin: from H7676

TWOT entry: 2323d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
